title: [Screenful] Introducing support for monday.com custom object
excerpt: Previously you were able to add Screenful as a board view, connected to a specific board. Now we’ve added a custom object that allows you to add a link to the left menu so that you are not limited to viewing charts & rep…

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Previously you were able to add Screenful as a board view, connected to a specific board. Now we’ve added a custom object that allows you to add a link to the left menu so that you are not limited to viewing charts & reports in the context of any individual board.

What is a custom object and what is it good for? Learn more from our blog post
